No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to zero hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course topic '藥局' (Pharmacy) explicitly links to access to essential health-care services (Target 3.8).

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), teaches literacy ('讀、寫韓國文字' for 4.6), and fosters cultural diversity ('人文素養' for 4.7).
evidence: 具備人文素養及知識 Humanity literacy & science

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops 'Practical ability' (Target 8.5) and includes topics like '郵局、銀行' (Post office, bank) related to financial services (Target 8.10).
evidence: 具備卓越之專業實務能力 Practical ability

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Course topics '交通' (Transportation) and '電話' (Telephone) are explicit components of infrastructure (Target 9.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Developing 'Humanity literacy & science' through language learning can indirectly foster intercultural understanding and social inclusion (Target 10.2).
evidence: 具備人文素養及知識 Humanity literacy & science

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course topic '交通' (Transportation) directly relates to access to safe and sustainable transport systems (Target 11.2).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to '維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍' (Respect Copyright) promotes responsible consumption of intellectual property (Target 12.8).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright) directly supports promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'Basic language skills' is foundational for international cooperation and knowledge sharing, directly supporting Target 17.6.
evidence: 具備基礎語言能力 Basic language skills
